findings.title: Wrapping addition in average computation
findings.description: wrapping_add accumulates i32 values that can wrap past i32::MAX producing incorrect average

findings.title: Wrapping addition in calibration offset
findings.description: wrapping_add of raw value and calibration offset can wrap when both are large

findings.title: Wrapping multiplication in power consumption
findings.description: wrapping_mul of voltage and current from user input can wrap i32 silently

findings.title: Wrapping multiplication in sample buffer allocation
findings.description: wrapping_mul of u32 sample_count and sample_size wraps to small value used as Vec allocation size

findings.title: Wrapping arithmetic in rate of change computation
findings.description: Chained wrapping_sub and wrapping_mul produce compounded incorrect results for large measurement deltas

findings.title: Wrapping multiplication in reading scale
findings.description: wrapping_mul of measurement value by user-provided factor wraps silently

findings.title: Wrapping multiplication in temperature conversion
findings.description: wrapping_mul of celsius_hundredths by 9 overflows for extreme temperature values in standard conversion formula
